added_content.ex_information:
Complete the table below.
Write
ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER
for each answer.

sentence.content: MAN: Good morning.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：早上好。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Hi. This is Shelley Mayer. I’m renting your house on Archwood Avenue. I’m due to move in next week.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：你好。我是谢莉·梅耶，我租了你在阿切伍德大道的房子。我下周就要搬进去了。

sentence.content: MAN: Oh yes, hello Ms Mayer. What can I do for you?
sentence.content_zh: 男生：哦，是的，梅耶女士，你好。我能帮你什么吗？

sentence.content: SHELLEY: When I viewed the house, I told you I’ll most probably need to rent some furniture – at least until I know whether my temporary work contract is going to be made permanent.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：看房子的时候我跟你说过，我可能需要租一些家具——至少要等到我知道临时工作合同会不会转为正式合同之后再说。

sentence.content: MAN: Yes of course, I remember. And I said I could give you some information about furniture rental companies in the city.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：对，我记得。我当时也说了，我可以给你提供一些关于市内家具租赁公司的信息。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: That’s right.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：没错。

sentence.content: MAN: Well, the biggest company is called Peak Rentals. I’ve recommended them to other people and have always heard positive reports about them.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：嗯，最大的一家公司叫Peak Rentals。我推荐过他们给其他人，也一直听到不错的反馈。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Could you give me an idea of their costs?
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：你能大概说一下他们的价格吗？

sentence.content: MAN: Sure, I actually have one of their brochures here. It says the monthly price per room starts at a hundred and five dollars and goes up to two hundred and thirty-nine dollars – that depends on which rooms you need furniture for, of course.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：当然，我这里刚好有一本他们的宣传册。上面写着每间房每月的价格从105美元起，最高到239美元——当然具体要看你需要哪几间房的家具。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Sure. It’s just to get a general idea of how much it’s gonna cost. And you said you had some positive feedback about this company.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：好的。我只是想大致了解一下费用情况。你也说过这家公司的评价不错。

sentence.content: MAN: Yes, people have mentioned that the furniture from Peak Rentals is more modern than any of the other companies.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：是的，人们提到Peak Rentals的家具比其他公司的更现代一些。

sentence.content: MAN: And also, once you place an order, the furniture will be delivered to you in just one or two days.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：而且，一旦你下单了，一两天之内就能送货上门。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: That would be really helpful.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：那真的挺方便的。

sentence.content: MAN: Oh, and the brochure says that there’s a special offer at the moment.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：哦，宣传册上还说他们现在有一个特别优惠。

sentence.content: MAN: If you rent living room furniture – I believe that’s a set of chairs and a TV table, you’ll also get a lamp at no extra cost.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：如果你租客厅家具——应该是一套椅子和一张电视桌，还会免费送你一个台灯。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: OK. But, you know, that price range you gave is more than I was hoping to pay.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：好的。不过那个价格区间比我预期的要高一些。

sentence.content: MAN: Then you could try Aaron and Oliver.
sentence.content_zh: 男声：那你可以试试Aaron and Oliver这家公司。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Sorry, what and Oliver?
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：抱歉，你说的是什么和Oliver？

sentence.content: MAN: Aaron. Double-A-R-O-N.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：Aaron。拼写是A-A-R-O-N。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: OK. Are they cheaper?
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：明白了。他们便宜些吗？

sentence.content: MAN: I’d say they’re a mid-price company. But if you chose them, you need to be aware that they charge an extra twelve per cent every month in case of damage.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：我觉得他们是中等价位的公司。但如果你选他们的话，要注意一点，他们会额外收取每月12%的费用以防家具损坏。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Oh I see. I’d have to do the math carefully then.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：哦，这样啊。那我得仔细算算账才行。

sentence.content: MAN: Right. But one helpful thing is that they also do cleaning for customers.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：对。不过一个好处是，他们也会帮客户做清洁服务。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: For the furniture?
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：是针对家具的吗？

sentence.content: MAN: For the house.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：是针对房子的清洁。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Oh I see. I probably won’t need that.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：哦，我明白了。我可能不需要这个服务。

sentence.content: MAN: There’s another company called Larch Furniture. It’s quite new, and it has the lowest prices in town.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：还有一家公司叫Larch Furniture，这是一家比较新的公司，价格是全城最低的。

sentence.content: MAN: That’s for both furniture and also electronic equipment.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：不光是家具，连电子设备也是低价位的。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Well that would be good. I’m not bringing much with me, and I won’t have much time to go shopping after I start my job.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：那太好了。我没打算带太多东西过去，而且开始工作后也不会有多少时间去逛街买东西。

sentence.content: MAN: There are two things you need to know about Larch Furniture. First of all, you have to take out insurance on the furniture, and you need to organise that yourself.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：关于Larch Furniture你需要注意两点。首先，你必须给家具上保险，而且你要自己办理这个手续。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: That wouldn’t be too hard.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：那应该不算太难。

sentence.content: MAN: Also, you can’t take out a contract for less than six months, but I figure that might not be a problem for you.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：另外，合同不能少于六个月。不过我觉得对你来说可能不是问题。

sentence.content: MAN: You’re renting the house for twelve months after all, aren’t you?
sentence.content_zh: 男生：反正你租房期是一年，对吧？

sentence.content: SHELLEY: Yes. OK, well I …
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：对。嗯……好吧，我……

sentence.content: MAN: … sorry to interrupt. I just thought of another furniture rental company. It’s called Space Rentals. And it’s located very near to the house.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：抱歉打断你。我刚刚又想起来另一家家具租赁公司，叫做Space Rentals。它就在你房子附近。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: OK.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：好的。

sentence.content: MAN: I don’t have any information about their charges, so it’s best to use their app to find out what it would cost you to use them.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：我没有他们具体的收费信息，所以最好你下载他们的App看看价格大概是多少。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: OK thanks. I’ll do that.
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：好的，谢谢。我会去看看的。

sentence.content: MAN: One good thing about that company is that if you don’t like the furniture once it’s delivered, you can request exchanges – as long as you do that within a week of receiving it.
sentence.content_zh: 男生：这家公司的一个好处是，如果家具送到后你觉得不满意，只要在收到后一周之内提出，就可以更换。

sentence.content: SHELLEY: That sounds really great. OK. Well thanks very much. That’s so helpful …
sentence.content_zh: 谢莉：听起来真的很不错。好的，非常感谢。你的帮助真的很大……

officialExplain.explain: 本题考察价格数字考点。结合空前的货币符号$，预测答案为数字，同时需要注意本题为价格区间中的最大值。这里range用作动词，意思是“（在一定的范围内）变化，变动”，题干中的Prices range from A to B可以理解为“价格在A到B之间变化，变动”，或者“价格从A到B不等”。在原文中，monthly对应题干的per month，per room原词重现，starts at对应题干中range from，接下来a hundred and five dollars辅助定位。原文中up to意思是“达到（某数量、程度等）”或者“至多有”，之后出现价格数字239，即本题答案。

本题关键词不明显，需要注意灵活定位。原文对话中的女士提及...how much it’s gonna cost时，仍然对应第1题相关内容；下一句提及And you said you had some positive feedback，可知对应表格中表头为Additional notes的内容。接下来的原文中，男士紧跟着提及Peak Rentals家具的相关内容是modern，即本题答案，意为“时新的，现代化的，最新的”。

结合题干中空格前后的内容以及词数要求，预测答案为名词。在原文中，one or two days以及special offer出现较为明显。接下来题干中空格后的living room提前于答案出现，之后提及内容为a set of chairs和a TV table，但此处原文中没有对应题干free的内容。紧跟着提及的名词为lamp，相关内容no extra cost对应题干中的free。lamp即本题答案，意为“灯”。
结合表格中的表头Name of company以及空后的Oliver，预测答案为名称。原文中讲到Aaron and Oliver，之后给出了Aaron的字母拼写，需要注意原文拼读方式为Double-A-R-O-N。
原文中mid-price对应题干中的Mid-range prices，12%原词重现，原文中charge和every month分别对应题干中的fee和monthly，之后提及内容为in case of damage，in case of sth表示“如果，假使”，damage即本题答案，在这里作名词，意为“损坏，破坏，损失”。

结合题干中空格前的内容，可以看出furniture和...items为并列结构。在原文中，可以先结合原词重现的公司名称Larch Furniture，定位到题干中本行开头内容。接下来原文中的lowest prices对应题干中的cheapest prices，furniture原词重现，接下来原文中的and also提醒答案相关内容即将出现。下一项内容为electronic equipment，equipment对应items，electronic即本题答案，意为“电子的，电子器件的”。
结合空前内容，预测答案为名词。结合原文中男士讲到的two things和first of all，对应到本题，具体信息中的名词insurance即本题答案，意为“保险”，之后原文中的yourself对应题干中空前的own。另外，这部分原文后，男士还讲到Also，具体信息为时长相关，第7题后面的six months原词重现。
结合表格中的表头Name of company以及空后的Rentals，可以预测答案为名称。本题与第4题不同点在于未给出字母拼写。原文中结合another furniture rental company以及called定位在本题，紧随其后出现Space Rentals，Space即本题答案。
结合空前内容，预测答案为名词。在第8题原文之后，提及内容为费用相关，原文中的charges可以对应第9题的表头Information about costs以及空格后的prices。之后原文讲到best to use their app...，app即本题答案，意为“应用程序，应用软件”。
结合空后的are，预测答案为复数名词。第9题原文之后，结合One good thing about that company对应到本题，具体信息为request exchanges，exchanges即本题答案，exchange意为“交换，调换”。答案出现后，原文中的within a week对应题干中的within 7 days。
